name: Rippling

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Generate from Rippling: Settings → API → Create API Key

description: Sync employee, HR, and organizational data from Rippling.
long_description: Connect Shielva to Rippling to sync your HR data — employees, departments, teams, roles, and leave requests — into your knowledge base for AI-powered search and analysis.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync employees and departments into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Employees
apis.description: Return all Rippling employees, paginating through all cursor pages.

apis.name: List Leaves
apis.description: Return all Rippling leave requests, paginating through all cursor pages.
